qa_pairs.question: What is required if an Academic Principal Investigator's Canadian Common CV (CCV) on file is older than 90 days when applying for a Resource Allocation Competition (RAC)?
qa_pairs.answer: If an Academic Principal Investigator's Canadian Common CV (CCV) on file is older than 90 days, they will be required to submit a new CCV with their Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application.

qa_pairs.question: What are the steps for an Academic Principal Investigator to submit a new Canadian Common CV (CCV) if their existing one on file is older than 90 days for a Resource Allocation Competition (RAC) application?
qa_pairs.answer: An Academic Principal Investigator must go to the CCV website, make any necessary changes to the Alliance CCV template, and submit it. Afterwards, they need to enter the new CCV confirmation code on CCDB and click the "Update CCV" button.
